title: HackTheBox — Facts
excerpt: HackTheBox Facts machine recon — nginx, MinIO, and Camaleon CMS on Ubuntu. Full writeup restricted while machine is active.

title: HackTheBox — Expressway
excerpt: HackTheBox Expressway writeup — IKE aggressive mode PSK leak, credential reuse to SSH, and CVE-2025-32462 sudo host policy bypass to root.

title: Ftarg — Ch.3: The Management Layer — Bot, Database, Automation
excerpt: Telegram bot, encrypted storage, Marzban API integration, and the automation that keeps the whole thing running.

title: Ftarg — Ch.2: Architecture — Marzban and XRay
excerpt: The actual stack behind the proxy service — Marzban, XRay, Docker with host networking, and solving the asymmetric routing problem with XRay's native WireGuard outbound.

title: Axios Supply Chain Attack: npm Account Hijack Deploys Cross-Platform RAT
excerpt: Breakdown of the March 2026 axios npm supply chain attack — how a hijacked maintainer account pushed backdoored versions delivering a cross-platform RAT to millions of developers.

title: Proxy service. Ch.1: Why Most Proxy Protocols Fail Against Modern DPI
excerpt: How DPI fingerprints VPN traffic at the protocol level, and why TLS 1.3 impersonation is the only transport-level approach that survives modern inspection.

title: SOC Lab — Ch.2: Sysmon, Suricata & Wazuh Integration
excerpt: Expanding the SOC lab with Sysmon deep-logging on Windows and Suricata IDS on the server. Configuring Wazuh to ingest both host-based and network telemetry.

title: SOC Lab — Ch.1: Setup & SIEM Deployment
excerpt: Building a home SOC lab with Wazuh SIEM, a Windows 10 endpoint, and Kali Linux as attacker. Covers internal networking, static IPs, and agent registration.

title: Nmap: Tips & Techniques for CTF
excerpt: Practical Nmap command reference for CTF and pentesting. SYN scanning, firewall evasion, NSE scripting, output formats, and scan delta comparison.
